mainEntity.name: When is Argentinos Juniors's next match?

acceptedAnswer.text: Argentinos Juniors's next match is at 21:15 BST on Sat, 11 Apr 2026 against Independiente Rivadavia.
Argentinos Juniors stadium is located in Capital Federal, Ciudad de Bueno and is called Estadio Diego Armando Maradona.

mainEntity.name: What is the capacity of Estadio Diego Armando Maradona?

acceptedAnswer.text: The capacity for Estadio Diego Armando Maradona is 24380.

mainEntity.name: When was Estadio Diego Armando Maradona opened?

acceptedAnswer.text: Estadio Diego Armando Maradona opened in 1940.
